items.h: Backstage Report On Jack Perry Signing His AEW Contract On Dynamite
items.p: After weeks of speculation, "Jungle" Jack Perry re-signed with AEW. He is an AEW Original and has been with the company for seven years.

items.h: Jim Ross Comments On Ex-WWE Star Sheamus Possibly Coming To AEW, Re-Forming Tag Team
items.p: Jim Ross believes that Sheamus would be a great addition to AEW's roster, especially if he reunites with his former WWE tag team partner.
